title: Tallon International Colour Your Own Christmas Bunting - Craft Kit - 8 Paper Flags with Images to Colour,White(XK0078)
features: Colour your own Banner Bunting / Banner - Includes 5 Colouring Pencils
8 Paper Flags of Christmas Images (Printed on one side)
Each Flag: 14.5 x 20cm - Flags are pre-threaded on Red ribbon. Ribbon is 2 metres long
Perfect holiday activity: This craft kit provides a fun and engaging activity for kids during the Christmas season, keeping them entertained and occupied.
Includes everything you need: This craft kit comes with all the materials needed to create your own Christmas bunting, making it convenient and hassle-free.
